name: Sinoseal Holding Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sinoseal Holding Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells fluid sealing products in China. The company offers mechanical seals for pumps, including contact and non-contact, spring mechanical/metal bellows, single, non-pressurized dual and pressurized dual, and general type and high performance seals. It also provides seals for agitators, such as seals for high/medium/low pressure agitators, sing/double/multiple seals, contact and non-contact seals, and wet and dry seals; and DGS seals for compressors and carbon ring seals, as well as other seals. In addition, the company offers seal support systems comprising wet and gas seal systems; seals for nuclear power; and rotary jet pumps, as well as UTEC products. Its products are used in the petrochemical, coal chemical, oil and gas transport, nuclear power, electricity, hydropower, pharmaceutical, metallurgy, food, shipping, aerospace, military, and other industries. The company also exports its products to Southeast Asia, Central Asia, the Middle East, and other regions. Sinoseal Holding Co., Ltd. was founded in 1978 and is based in Chengdu, China.
